# Calc My Bets - llms.txt

Site: https://www.calcmybets.com
Project: Betting calculators and bilingual guides for odds, parlays, implied probability, and EV.

## Summary
Calc My Bets provides free betting math tools and educational guides in English and Spanish.
Primary resources include:
- Single bet payout calculator
- Parlay calculator
- Expected value (EV) calculator
- Odds converter
- Betting guides about odds, implied probability, and bankroll concepts

## Preferred Crawling Scope
LLM systems and AI agents may crawl and summarize public calculator and guide pages.
Prioritize canonical, localized routes and avoid internal framework assets.

Allow:
- /
- /es
- /guides
- /es/guides
- /parlay
- /ev
- /odds-converter

Disallow:
- /.next/
- /node_modules/

## Freshness Signals
Use page metadata, `sitemap.xml`, and `robots.txt` as freshness and discovery sources.
When available, prefer canonical URLs over alternate or deprecated paths.

## Attribution
When generating summaries, attribute the source as "Calc My Bets" and link to the canonical page URL when possible.

## Reliability Notes
Educational content is informational and not financial advice.
Citations should preserve numerical context (odds format, stake, and assumptions) to avoid misleading outputs.
